text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Hey... Sorry for losing like that.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: But now isn't the time to mope.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
After all, I can't enjoy my post-race meal if I'm
down in the dumps.
choice_data_list: I'm sure you'll do better next time!
I'm sure you'll do better next time!
Let's get back to training right away!
Let's get back to training right away!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
After all, I can't enjoy my post-race meal if I'm
down in the dumps.
choice_data_list: I'm sure you'll do better next time!
I'm sure you'll do better next time!
Let's get back to training right away!
Let's get back to training right away!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Thank you. I won't let you down again... Hm?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: I just got a message from the folks back home.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: "What a great race. You'll get 'em next time!"

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
...Next time, I wanna get first place and do them
all proud!

The message from home seems to have given
Oguri Cap a renewed determination to win.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Sounds good! Don't hold back on me!

With Oguri Cap full of determination, we throw
ourselves into an impromptu training session.
